title: Course: COSC 351 - Cybersecurity
description: Presents threats analyzing and prediction, vulnerabilities and risks. Topics include identification and authentication, encryption and certifications, security in UNIX and Windows environments, malicious software, trusted computer systems, network attacks and defenses, firewalls, intrusion detection and prevention, database security.
prerequisites_text: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 351 - Cybersecurity
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Presents threats analyzing and prediction, vulnerabilities and risks. Topics include identification and authentication, encryption and certifications, security in UNIX and Windows environments, malicious software, trusted computer systems, network attacks and defenses, firewalls, intrusion detection and prevention, database security.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Core
  - BS Cloud Computing: Core

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55588
